experimental.title: Rotation-flip detector (Leading/Improving -> Peaking/Weakening) as a state-transition timing layer
experimental.note: THIS RUN the detector flags an XLV->XLRE hand-off on the fresh pre-close 2026-07-22 sector bar (recomputed 2026-07-22T18:48:21.992Z): XLV Weakening (quad W, accel -2.7, rsMom6m -7.37, rsMom 98.25) rolling out while XLRE Leading (quad L, accel +1.5, rsMom 100.89, rsMom6m -0.48) rotates in as the rotate-into name; XLK is the index leader but only Basing/Accumulate (quad A, accel +0.54, rsMom1m -6.51). This is a DEFENSIVE(healthcare)->REAL-ESTATE hand-off - a low-beta/rate-sensitive reshuffle, NOT the cyclical risk-on roll seen on prior bars. XLRE's medium-term trend is thin/negative (rsMom3m -2.71, rsMom6m -0.48, +7.55% >200d), so it is actionable only as a tilt and flagged for persistence per anti-whipsaw. The value is the state-transition TIMING, which no owning tool persists today. Persistence is counted across DISTINCT market-bar dates (a persisted prior-bar snapshot vs this 2026-07-22 bar), never repeated intraday runs.
experimental.method: State-transition detector: on each fresh market-bar date, detect a sector exiting a strong RRG quadrant (Leading->Peaking or Improving->Weakening) with negative acceleration, then event-study forward 5/10-day sector return conditioned on next-catalyst confirm/deny. Persistence is counted across distinct market-bar dates, never repeated intraday runs.
inputs: sector-research-lab per-sector rsRatio / rsMom / accel / quad, counted across distinct market-bar dates (persisted prior-bar snapshot vs the 2026-07-22 bar)

experimental.title: Cross-tool haven-abstinence x sector-rotation risk-on gate (DOES NOT cleanly fire this run - rotate-into leg is defensive)
experimental.note: THIS RUN the joint state does NOT cleanly fire on the honest read. The metal-haven leg IS satisfied - GLD 17.5 and SLV 0 both Downtrend (mom63 -11.63 / -20.92), IBIT 32.6 Downtrend, BTC-USD 49.4 Mixed but medium-term soft (mom63 -15.04) so there is no haven bid - BUT the sector leg (b) is UNMET: the rotate-into name is XLRE (real estate, rate-sensitive/low-beta), not a cyclical or growth sector, and XLK is only Basing, so the roll is defensive-to-defensive/rate-sensitive rather than a broad defensive-to-cyclical risk-on turn. The gate's value is exactly this distinction: haven-abstinence alone is NOT risk-on when the rotate-into leg is itself defensive (this run) versus the clean risk-on state where a cyclical/growth name leads. Needs a persisted prior-bar snapshot to compute the state-transition delta across distinct market-bar dates.
experimental.method: Joint-state gate: on each fresh market-bar date, AND the real-assets monetary-haven leg (metals in downtrends) with the sector-RRG defensive-out/cyclical-or-growth-in vector (no clean Leading defensive) to declare a 'clean risk-on' state, then event-study forward bench drift for the joint state versus either half alone. State-transition delta is measured across distinct market-bar dates.
inputs: real-assets-lab GLD / SLV / IBIT / BTC-USD trend + mom63 (haven-abstinence leg)
sector-research-lab per-name rrgState / rotation / accel with a GICS defensive/cyclical tag
a persisted prior-bar snapshot to compute the state-transition delta across distinct market-bar dates
